nasb.text: They brought the captives and the prey and the spoil to Moses, and to Eleazar the priest and to the congregation of the sons of Israel, to the camp at the plains of Moab, which are by the Jordan opposite Jericho.

esv.text: Then they brought the captives and the plunder and the spoil to Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and to the congregation of the people of Israel, at the camp on the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

cnv.text: 他們把俘擄的人和擄來的，以及奪來的東西，都帶到摩押平原，約旦河邊，和耶利哥相對的營地那裡，交給摩西和以利亞撒祭司，以及以色列的會眾。

ccb.text: 他们来到耶利哥对面、约旦河边的摩押平原，把战利品交给摩西、以利亚撒祭司和以色列全体会众。
